scripts.android:apk: npm run android:prebuild && cd android && NODE_ENV=production ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.android:apk:waydroid: npm run env:local:waydroid && npm run android:apk
scripts.android:apk:prod: npm run env:prod && npm run android:apk
scripts.android:waydroid: npm run android:apk && waydroid app install android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk && waydroid show-full-ui && waydroid app launch com.hackatao.care
scripts.android:waydroid:local: npm run android:apk:waydroid && waydroid app install android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk && waydroid show-full-ui && waydroid app launch com.hackatao.care
scripts.android:waydroid:prod: npm run android:apk:prod && waydroid app install android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk && waydroid show-full-ui && waydroid app launch com.hackatao.care
scripts.android:genymotion: npm run android:apk && adb install -r android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk && adb shell monkey -p com.hackatao.care 1
